ops.text: Convert Accessibility Chill unit from Hours to Minutes for easier testing.
Bind projectType (Web vs Native) to specific repository configurations in localStorage

ops.find_block:
let CONFIG = { 
        funcUrl: localStorage.getItem('conduit_funcUrl') || '',
        // Project context prefers sessionStorage for tab isolation
        repoName: sessionStorage.getItem('conduit_repoName') || localStorage.getItem('conduit_repoName') || 'IDE',
        isOrg: (sessionStorage.getItem('conduit_isOrg') === 'true' || localStorage.getItem('conduit_isOrg') === 'true'),
        projectPath: sessionStorage.getItem('conduit_projectPath') || localStorage.getItem('conduit_projectPath') || '',
        autoFix: false,
        autoSanity: false,
        showPreview: localStorage.getItem('conduit_showPreview') !== 'false',
        efDeploymentMode: localStorage.getItem('conduit_ef_mode') || 'default',
        projectType: (JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('conduit_repo_configs') || '{}')[sessionStorage.getItem('conduit_repoName') || localStorage.getItem('conduit_repoName') || 'IDE']?.projectType) || 'web',
        omitHeaders: localStorage.getItem('conduit_omitHeaders') === 'true',
        wasmValidation: localStorage.getItem('conduit_wasm_validation') !== 'false',
        floatingConsole: localStorage.getItem('conduit_floating_console') === 'true',
        consoleHalf: localStorage.getItem('conduit_console_half') === 'true'
    };

        projectPath: sessionStorage.getItem('conduit_projectPath') || localStorage.getItem('conduit_projectPath') || '',
        autoFix: false,
        autoSanity: false,
        showPreview: localStorage.getItem('conduit_showPreview') !== 'false',
        efDeploymentMode: localStorage.getItem('conduit_ef_mode') || 'default',
        projectType: (JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('conduit_repo_configs') || '{}')[sessionStorage.getItem('conduit_repoName') || localStorage.getItem('conduit_repoName') || 'IDE']?.projectType) || 'web',
        omitHeaders: localStorage.getItem('conduit_omitHeaders') === 'true',
